status_note: W1–W3 implemented; W4 Human Workflows UI implemented (INI-UX-001).

requirements.title: Governing institution
requirements.text: Every initiative must belong to one governing institution.

requirements.title: Accountable Human owner
requirements.text: Every active initiative must have an eligible accountable Human owner.

requirements.title: Service identity prohibition
requirements.text: A service identity may not serve as initiative owner.

requirements.title: Approved purpose
requirements.text: Every active initiative must have an approved purpose.

requirements.title: Defined scope
requirements.text: Every active initiative must define institutional, functional, Human, geographic, data, resource, public, and time scope as applicable.

requirements.title: Bounded authority
requirements.text: Initiative authority may not exceed the owner's institutional authority.

requirements.title: Draft does not grant authority
requirements.text: Creating an initiative draft does not grant execution authority.

requirements.title: Strategic linkage
requirements.text: Every active initiative must link to an institutional mission, strategic priority, formal mandate, approved need, emergency authorization, or compliance obligation.

requirements.title: Governed lifecycle
requirements.text: Every initiative must follow a governed lifecycle.

requirements.title: Version history
requirements.text: Major initiative changes must preserve version history.

requirements.title: Closeout basis
requirements.text: Every active initiative must have a closeout basis.

requirements.title: Review requirement
requirements.text: An initiative may not remain indefinitely active without review.

requirements.title: Cross-institution boundaries
requirements.text: Cross-institution participation must preserve institutional authority and data boundaries.

requirements.title: Visibility vs authority
requirements.text: Visibility does not grant edit, assignment, data, or decision authority.

requirements.title: AI boundaries
requirements.text: AI may assist but may not own, approve, activate, materially expand, cancel, or complete an initiative.

requirements.title: Attribution
requirements.text: Every consequential initiative action must be attributable to a canonical Human or governed service identity.

requirements.title: Cancellation history
requirements.text: Initiative cancellation must preserve reason, authority, unfinished obligations, and history.

requirements.title: Emergency expiration
requirements.text: Emergency initiative authority must be time-limited and reviewed.

requirements.title: Owner required state
requirements.text: An active initiative without an eligible owner must enter an operational exception state.

requirements.title: History preservation
requirements.text: Initiative history may not be silently deleted through ordinary operations.

requirements.title: Decision rights policy
requirements.text: Institutions must define who may create, approve, activate, pause, cancel, close, and archive initiatives.

requirements.title: Governance classes
requirements.text: Institutions must define governance classes and approval requirements.

requirements.title: Review frequency
requirements.text: Institutions must define initiative review frequency.

requirements.title: Backup owner policy
requirements.text: Institutions must define which initiative types require backup owners.

requirements.title: Public visibility rules
requirements.text: Institutions must define public visibility rules.

requirements.title: Emergency authority policy
requirements.text: Institutions must define emergency initiative authority.

requirements.title: Charter version thresholds
requirements.text: Institutions must define charter version approval thresholds.

requirements.title: Closeout and archival
requirements.text: Institutions must define closeout and archival retention.

requirements.title: Membership resolution
requirements.text: Initiative authority must resolve through the active institution membership.

requirements.title: Activation authority
requirements.text: A Human may not activate an initiative outside their institutional authority.

requirements.title: Coalition role boundary
requirements.text: Cross-institution initiative roles may not grant host-institution authority.

requirements.title: Ownership change audit
requirements.text: Initiative ownership changes must require authorization and audit.

requirements.title: Archived protection
requirements.text: Archived initiative records must remain protected from unauthorized modification.

requirements.title: Emergency auto-expire
requirements.text: Emergency authority must expire automatically unless reviewed and renewed.

requirements.title: Explicit visibility
requirements.text: Initiative visibility must be explicitly defined.

requirements.title: Public information boundary
requirements.text: Public initiative information must exclude private Human, identity, support, and verification information.

requirements.title: Participating institution scope
requirements.text: Participating institution membership must not be exposed beyond the approved scope.

requirements.title: Data minimization
requirements.text: Initiative charters should collect only information necessary for governance and execution.

requirements.title: Sensitive population gates
requirements.text: Sensitive populations and data must trigger later safety and privacy gates.

requirements.title: Plain language
requirements.text: Initiative terminology must be understandable in plain language.

requirements.title: State not color-only
requirements.text: Initiative states must not depend on color alone.

requirements.title: Keyboard and screen reader
requirements.text: Charter creation must support keyboard and screen-reader use.

requirements.title: Mobile reflow
requirements.text: Initiative information must reflow on mobile and tablet.

requirements.title: Spanish support
requirements.text: Critical initiative workflows must support conversational Spanish.

requirements.title: Canonical initiative table
requirements.text: One canonical initiatives table keyed by initiative_id.

requirements.title: One operational owner
requirements.text: Exactly one active operational owner per initiative.

requirements.title: Immutable version history
requirements.text: Initiative versions are append-only; no overwrite.

requirements.title: Charter entity
requirements.text: InitiativeCharter stores constitutional purpose, scope statements, and alignment.

requirements.title: Scope entity
requirements.text: InitiativeScope defines geographic, population, institutional, functional, resource, data, and visibility boundaries.

requirements.title: Timeline entity
requirements.text: InitiativeTimeline stores lifecycle dates and review schedule.

requirements.title: Membership entity
requirements.text: InitiativeMembership records every participating Human with role and institution context.

requirements.title: Canonical lifecycle states
requirements.text: Single canonical status model with one active status per initiative.

requirements.title: Illegal transitions rejected
requirements.text: Platform rejects illegal lifecycle transitions such as concept to completed.

requirements.title: History events immutable
requirements.text: InitiativeHistory append-only; no silent overwrite.

requirements.title: Dependency model
requirements.text: InitiativeDependency supports typed relationships with cycle detection.

requirements.title: Review entity
requirements.text: InitiativeReview stores scheduled and completed reviews.

requirements.title: Closeout entity
requirements.text: InitiativeCloseout records governed end state and obligations.

requirements.title: Immutable identifiers
requirements.text: initiative_id and child IDs never change after creation.

requirements.title: Soft archive only
requirements.text: Initiatives, charters, history, versions, and audit are never hard-deleted.

requirements.title: Activation prerequisites
requirements.text: Cannot activate without institution, owners, purpose, scope, and approved charter.

requirements.title: Cross-institution membership
requirements.text: Membership records institution_id; coalition roles do not grant host authority.

requirements.title: Portfolio metadata
requirements.text: Initiative supports portfolio_category and search metadata fields.

requirements.title: Version triggers
requirements.text: Major changes create new version records per versioning rules.

requirements.title: Owner required state
requirements.text: owner_required is a valid lifecycle exception state in the canonical model.

requirements.title: Legacy adapter
requirements.text: Legacy MVP flat initiative projects to canonical aggregate without duplicate root.

requirements.title: Aggregate integrity
requirements.text: InitiativeAggregate validates cross-entity consistency.

requirements.title: Single mutation path
requirements.text: All Initiative mutations must pass through the authoritative Initiative domain service.

requirements.title: Command context resolution
requirements.text: Every mutation must resolve actor, institution, membership, authority, and Initiative scope.

requirements.title: Nonactive draft start
requirements.text: Initiative creation must begin in a nonactive draft lifecycle state.

requirements.title: Draft no execution authority
requirements.text: Draft creation must not confer activation or institutional authority.

requirements.title: Typed lifecycle commands
requirements.text: Lifecycle changes must use explicit typed commands.

requirements.title: Traceable command IDs
requirements.text: Every command must support traceable request and correlation identifiers.

requirements.title: Stage-specific charter validation
requirements.text: Charter validation must vary by lifecycle stage.

requirements.title: Block incomplete charter transitions
requirements.text: Approval and activation must be blocked by missing required charter content.

requirements.title: Cross-field validation errors
requirements.text: Cross-field contradictions must produce explainable validation errors.

requirements.title: Operational owner for activation
requirements.text: Activation requires one eligible active operational owner.

requirements.title: Owner eligibility validation
requirements.text: Ownership assignment must require Human eligibility validation.

requirements.title: Ownership acceptance
requirements.text: Owner nomination must not become active ownership without required acceptance.

requirements.title: Owner eligibility loss exception
requirements.text: Owner eligibility loss must trigger an operational exception.

requirements.title: No service identity owner
requirements.text: A service identity or AI actor may not become an Initiative owner.

requirements.title: Ownership transfer history
requirements.text: Ownership transfers must preserve complete assignment history.

requirements.title: Canonical transitions only
requirements.text: Only transitions defined by the canonical state machine may execute.

requirements.title: Reject illegal transitions
requirements.text: Illegal lifecycle transitions must fail without intermediate-state fabrication.

requirements.title: Scheduled transition revalidation
requirements.text: Scheduled lifecycle transitions must revalidate at execution time.

requirements.title: Distinct pause cancel complete
requirements.text: Pause, cancellation, completion, and archive must remain distinct.

requirements.title: Archived read-only
requirements.text: Archived Initiatives must remain read-only for ordinary execution.

requirements.title: Policy-derived approvals
requirements.text: Approval requirements must derive from governance class, scope, risk, and institutional policy.

requirements.title: Charter version binding
requirements.text: Approvals must bind to a specific charter version.

requirements.title: Blocking approval conditions
requirements.text: Blocking approval conditions must prevent activation until satisfied.

requirements.title: Transactional activation
requirements.text: Activation must occur as a single validated transaction.

requirements.title: Governed scope change
requirements.text: Material scope changes must use a governed change request.

requirements.title: New charter version on material change
requirements.text: Approved material changes must create a new charter version.

requirements.title: Immutable prior versions
requirements.text: Prior charter versions must remain immutable and retrievable.

requirements.title: Governing institution change process
requirements.text: Changing the governing institution may not be performed as an ordinary field edit.

requirements.title: Emergency scope expiration
requirements.text: Temporary emergency scope must expire or receive governed renewal.

requirements.title: Blocking dependencies
requirements.text: Blocking dependencies must prevent activation or other configured transitions.

requirements.title: Circular dependency detection
requirements.text: The service must detect direct and indirect circular dependencies.

requirements.title: Dependency waiver governance
requirements.text: Dependency waivers must require authority, rationale, duration, and audit.

requirements.title: No constitutional waiver
requirements.text: Constitutional requirements may not be waived through dependency rules.

requirements.title: Cancellation preservation
requirements.text: Cancellation must preserve reason, authority, obligations, and resource disposition.

requirements.title: Closeout validation
requirements.text: Completion must require governed closeout validation.

requirements.title: Honest completion classification
requirements.text: Completion must not automatically imply that every objective was achieved.

requirements.title: Archive history preservation
requirements.text: Archive must preserve history and prevent new ordinary execution.

requirements.title: Successor lineage
requirements.text: A successor Initiative must receive a new identifier and explicit lineage.

requirements.title: Command idempotency
requirements.text: High-impact commands must be idempotent.

requirements.title: Optimistic concurrency
requirements.text: Mutations must use optimistic concurrency or an equivalent conflict-control mechanism.

requirements.title: Consistent state and events
requirements.text: Lifecycle state, history, and domain events must commit consistently.

requirements.title: Notification failure isolation
requirements.text: External notification failure must not corrupt authoritative Initiative state.

requirements.title: Institution context on every screen
requirements.text: Every Initiative screen must visibly identify the current institution.

requirements.title: Lifecycle state display
requirements.text: Every Initiative screen must clearly display the current lifecycle state.

requirements.title: Server reauthorization
requirements.text: The interface may display available actions, but the server must reauthorize every action.

requirements.title: Blocked action explanations
requirements.text: Blocked actions must explain the reason and next responsible step.

requirements.title: No direct status edit
requirements.text: Users must never be asked to edit authoritative status values directly.

requirements.title: Explicit lifecycle actions
requirements.text: Initiative lifecycle changes must use explicit Human-readable actions.

requirements.title: Clear next action
requirements.text: Every primary screen must surface one clear next action or explain that none is required.

requirements.title: Institution-aware routes
requirements.text: Every Initiative route must preserve and display the active institution context.

requirements.title: Nonactive proposal wizard
requirements.text: The creation wizard must create a nonactive Initiative proposal.

requirements.title: Nomination vs ownership
requirements.text: The creation experience must distinguish owner nomination from accepted ownership.

requirements.title: Charter workbench readiness
requirements.text: The charter workbench must expose stage-specific readiness.

requirements.title: Blocking vs recommendations
requirements.text: The Readiness Center must distinguish blocking requirements from recommendations.

requirements.title: Readiness blocker explanations
requirements.text: Every readiness blocker must identify a reason and next responsible action.

requirements.title: Explicit lifecycle UI
requirements.text: The interface must expose explicit lifecycle actions rather than direct status editing.

requirements.title: No proposed-as-active owner
requirements.text: The interface must not display a proposed Human as the active owner.

requirements.title: Keyboard operable workflows
requirements.text: Every core Initiative workflow must be operable by keyboard.

requirements.title: Spanish core workflows
requirements.text: Every core Initiative workflow must support conversational Spanish.

requirements.title: Initiative portfolio
requirements.text: Institutions must have a portfolio view for discovery and attention management.

requirements.title: Initiative home attention
requirements.text: The active Initiative home must surface current attention and next actions.

requirements.title: Human-readable history
requirements.text: Initiative history must remain understandable without exposing raw audit infrastructure.

requirements.title: Writes via W3 commands
requirements.text: Every Initiative write interface must invoke an approved Wave 3 domain command.

requirements.title: No unrestricted CRUD
requirements.text: No API may expose unrestricted Initiative CRUD.

requirements.title: Resolved request context
requirements.text: Every request must resolve authenticated actor, institution context, membership, and permission.

requirements.title: Explicit lifecycle actions
requirements.text: Every lifecycle mutation must use an explicit action endpoint or typed command.

requirements.title: Request tracing
requirements.text: Every mutation must support correlation and request tracing.

requirements.title: High-impact idempotency
requirements.text: High-impact mutations must support idempotency.

requirements.title: No client authority
requirements.text: API clients may not choose authoritative actor, institution, status, approval, or audit values without server validation.

requirements.title: Structured errors
requirements.text: All API errors must use structured domain-safe error responses.

requirements.title: Filtered queries
requirements.text: Initiative query responses must be filtered by institution, visibility, participation, and authority.

requirements.title: Bounded pagination
requirements.text: Initiative collection endpoints must support bounded pagination.

requirements.title: Advisory permissions
requirements.text: The API must return available actions without treating them as final authorization.

requirements.title: Mutation reauthorization
requirements.text: Every server mutation must reauthorize even when the UI previously received permission.

requirements.title: Versioned domain events
requirements.text: Every consequential Initiative mutation must produce a versioned domain event.

requirements.title: Idempotent consumers
requirements.text: Event delivery must support at-least-once delivery with idempotent consumers.

requirements.title: Replay without commands
requirements.text: Event replay must not re-execute domain commands.

requirements.title: Event schema registry
requirements.text: Event schemas must be versioned and registered.

requirements.title: Search visibility
requirements.text: Search must enforce Initiative visibility and institution scope.

requirements.title: Event-driven notifications
requirements.text: Notifications must be produced from authoritative Initiative events and governed audience policy.

requirements.title: Calendar read-only lifecycle
requirements.text: Calendar integrations may schedule or display Initiative timing but may not directly mutate lifecycle state.

requirements.title: Derived analytics
requirements.text: Analytics must use derived projections rather than becoming an alternate Initiative source of truth.

requirements.title: Downstream contracts
requirements.text: Downstream Phase 11 modules must use documented Initiative contracts and identifiers.

requirements.title: No fabricated authority on import
requirements.text: Imports may not fabricate Human ownership acceptance, approval, activation, or Initiative history.

requirements.title: Export manifests
requirements.text: Every Initiative export must state purpose, scope, requester, fields, classification, and expiration.

requirements.title: Scoped webhooks
requirements.text: Webhook subscriptions must be institution-scoped and event-scoped.

requirements.title: Signed webhooks
requirements.text: Webhook payloads must be signed and replay-resistant.

requirements.title: Advisory intelligence only
requirements.text: Intelligence must recommend and explain without mutating Initiative authority.

requirements.title: Explainable recommendations
requirements.text: Every recommendation must include why, evidence, confidence, and suggested action.

requirements.title: Dismissible recommendations
requirements.text: Humans must be able to dismiss recommendations without domain mutation.

requirements.title: Permission-first intelligence
requirements.text: Intelligence must filter by institution scope before analysis.

requirements.title: Duplicate detection advisory
requirements.text: Duplicate detection must suggest comparison, never auto-merge.

requirements.title: Risk alerts only
requirements.text: Risk intelligence must alert Humans without changing Initiative status.

requirements.title: Capacity visibility
requirements.text: Capacity intelligence must surface workload without assigning owners.

requirements.title: Institution knowledge graph
requirements.text: Institution graph must connect initiatives, people, and dependencies.

requirements.title: Initiative intelligence graph
requirements.text: Each Initiative must expose a local intelligence graph.

requirements.title: Executive brief
requirements.text: Executive brief must summarize priorities and risks in five minutes.

requirements.title: Copilot governance
requirements.text: AI copilot may not approve, activate, assign ownership, or delete records.

requirements.title: Copilot explainability
requirements.text: Copilot answers must include confidence and evidence.

requirements.title: Portfolio intelligence
requirements.text: Portfolio intelligence must summarize health and bottlenecks.

requirements.title: Dependency forecast
requirements.text: Dependency intelligence must forecast cascades without executing commands.

requirements.title: Timeline collisions
requirements.text: Timeline intelligence must detect date collisions across Initiatives.

requirements.title: Historical learning
requirements.text: Completed Initiatives must contribute institutional memory insights.

requirements.title: Advisory optimization only
requirements.text: Optimization must recommend and explain without mutating Initiative authority or governance.

requirements.title: Explainable optimizations
requirements.text: Every optimization must include why, evidence, confidence, expected benefit, and who should review.

requirements.title: Optimization feedback loop
requirements.text: Humans must record accepted, rejected, modified, deferred, or not applicable feedback without domain mutation.

requirements.title: Searchable institutional memory
requirements.text: Institutional memory must be searchable experience from completed Initiatives, not static documents only.

requirements.title: Process optimization advisory
requirements.text: Process recommendations must compare current and suggested steps without automatic change.

requirements.title: Proven workflow patterns
requirements.text: Repeated successful workflow patterns must be recommendable as templates.

requirements.title: Governance optimization
requirements.text: Governance bottlenecks must be surfaced without rewriting governance rules.

requirements.title: Training intelligence
requirements.text: Training gaps must be identified proactively from operational signals.

requirements.title: Template evolution
requirements.text: Completed Initiatives must feed template version recommendations.

requirements.title: Automation discovery
requirements.text: Automation opportunities must be visible but never auto-activated.

requirements.title: Organizational health
requirements.text: Executives must see organizational health dimensions beyond project metrics.

requirements.title: Community intelligence
requirements.text: Community signals must feed institutional learning.

requirements.title: Executive strategy
requirements.text: Strategy recommendations must include evidence and remain advisory.

requirements.title: Simulation sandbox
requirements.text: What-if simulations must not modify authoritative state.

requirements.title: Scenario comparison
requirements.text: Decision makers must compare strategic options before acting.

requirements.title: Digital twin
requirements.text: Institution digital twin must support safe planning tests without affecting reality.

requirements.title: Configuration validation
requirements.text: Production launch must validate configuration, environments, and feature flags before Go.

requirements.title: Rollback strategy documented
requirements.text: Every production deployment must have a documented Human-executed rollback strategy.

requirements.title: Institution bootstrap
requirements.text: Initial institution creation must use governed seed data, not fabricated records.

requirements.title: Template and governance seeds
requirements.text: Seed templates and default governance must be registered before organization launch.

requirements.title: Wave certification suite
requirements.text: Production certification must orchestrate W1–W7 wave gates before launch.

requirements.title: Constitutional compliance testing
requirements.text: Launch gates must verify constitutional prohibitions remain enforced.

requirements.title: Spanish certification
requirements.text: Spanish core vocabulary must be verified before statewide deployment.

requirements.title: Operational readiness
requirements.text: Backup, audit, monitoring, and health checks must be documented before multi-org launch.

requirements.title: Health check endpoint
requirements.text: Production health must be queryable without mutating state.

requirements.title: Go/No-Go dashboard
requirements.text: Launch control must surface Go/No-Go decision with critical issues and checklist completion.

requirements.title: Executive sign-off
requirements.text: Release and statewide launch require recorded Human executive sign-off.

requirements.title: No auto-deploy
requirements.text: The system may recommend launch readiness but must never auto-deploy.

requirements.title: Operator training
requirements.text: Administrator, executive, owner, approver, and member onboarding must be documented.

requirements.title: Continuous verification
requirements.text: Daily through annual verification schedules must be defined for production operations.

requirements.title: Production certification levels
requirements.text: Four certification levels from Pilot through Statewide must be evaluable with evidence.

requirements.title: Build 11.1 completion
requirements.text: Build 11.1 is complete only when all eight waves pass certification.

requirements.title: No execution without Objectives
requirements.text: Execution may never exist without Objectives.

requirements.title: Initiative may lack Objectives
requirements.text: An Initiative may exist without Objectives.

requirements.title: Objective belongs to Initiative
requirements.text: Every Objective must belong to exactly one Initiative.

requirements.title: Parent Initiative active gate
requirements.text: Objectives may not become Active until parent Initiative is Active.

requirements.title: Objective is not a task
requirements.text: An Objective must not be modeled as a task, meeting, calendar event, or checklist.

requirements.title: Execution hierarchy
requirements.text: Execution hierarchy from Institution through Lessons Learned must be defined.

requirements.title: Key Result parent
requirements.text: Every Key Result must belong to exactly one Objective.

requirements.title: Workstream parent
requirements.text: Every Workstream must belong to one primary Objective.

requirements.title: Mission parent
requirements.text: Every Mission must belong to one Workstream.

requirements.title: Deliverable parent
requirements.text: Every Deliverable must belong to one Mission.

requirements.title: Task parent
requirements.text: Every Task must belong to one Mission.

requirements.title: Upward traceability
requirements.text: Every Task must trace to Mission, Workstream, Objective, Initiative, and Institution.

requirements.title: Calendar trace
requirements.text: Every calendar event must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Resource trace
requirements.text: Every resource allocation must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Budget trace
requirements.text: Every budget item must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Permanent traceability
requirements.text: Completed work must retain permanent traceability.

requirements.title: Objective lifecycle
requirements.text: Objective lifecycle states must be enumerated from draft through archived.

requirements.title: Domain lifecycle enforcement
requirements.text: Lifecycle rules must be enforced by domain layer, not UI.

requirements.title: Executive owner
requirements.text: Every Objective must have an executive owner Human.

requirements.title: Operational owner
requirements.text: Every active Objective must have an operational owner Human.

requirements.title: Review authority
requirements.text: Every Objective must declare review authority.

requirements.title: Measurable key results
requirements.text: Key Results must be measurable indicators of Objective progress.

requirements.title: Workstream execution
requirements.text: Objectives execute through Workstreams as major lines of work.

requirements.title: Mission definition
requirements.text: A Mission is the smallest independently meaningful piece of work.

requirements.title: Milestone vs deliverable
requirements.text: Milestones mark progress; deliverables produce tangible outputs.

requirements.title: Layer success independence
requirements.text: Task, Mission, Objective, and Initiative success must evaluate independently.

requirements.title: Honest outcome categories
requirements.text: Objectives must support eight honest outcome categories including partial and unable to measure.

requirements.title: Review rhythm
requirements.text: Every Objective must declare a review rhythm.

requirements.title: Thirteen objective types
requirements.text: Platform must support thirteen canonical objective types.

requirements.title: Type does not change governance
requirements.text: Objective types influence recommendations but do not change governance rules.

requirements.title: AI may recommend
requirements.text: AI may recommend Objectives and suggest Key Results.

requirements.title: AI may not approve
requirements.text: AI may never approve or activate Objectives.

requirements.title: AI traceability
requirements.text: AI may not create Tasks without Mission traceability.

requirements.title: ObjectiveService
requirements.text: ObjectiveService must be declared for W3 implementation.

requirements.title: TraceabilityService
requirements.text: ObjectiveTraceabilityService must resolve ancestry for any work item.

requirements.title: Spanish vocabulary
requirements.text: Core Objective execution terms must have conversational Spanish equivalents.

requirements.title: Nine characteristic questions
requirements.text: Every Objective must answer nine constitutional characteristic questions.

requirements.title: Archived searchable
requirements.text: Archived Objectives remain searchable as institutional memory.

requirements.title: Communication trace
requirements.text: Communication campaigns must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Automation trace
requirements.text: Automations must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Volunteer assignment trace
requirements.text: Volunteer assignments must trace to an Objective.

requirements.title: Desired state definition
requirements.text: Objectives must declare current state, desired state, and evidence of success.

requirements.title: Time horizon
requirements.text: Every Objective must declare when the desired state should exist.

requirements.title: Fourteen canonical entities
requirements.text: Execution entity registry must enumerate exactly fourteen constitutional entities.

requirements.title: Canonical identity fields
requirements.text: Every execution object must have canonical_id, public_id, display_name, slug, version, and lifecycle state.

requirements.title: IDs never recycle
requirements.text: Canonical IDs are permanent and must never be reused after archival.

requirements.title: Required metadata
requirements.text: Every entity includes institution_id, initiative_id, parent, type, visibility, governance, ownership, and version.

requirements.title: Objective canonical model
requirements.text: ObjectiveRecord must include purpose, desired/current state, owners, success definition, and measurement strategy.

requirements.title: Key Result model
requirements.text: KeyResultRecord must include baseline, target, current value, unit, frequency, and completion criteria.

requirements.title: Mission model
requirements.text: MissionRecord links workstream and objective with operational lead, milestones, deliverables, and tasks.

requirements.title: Task model
requirements.text: TaskRecord must belong to exactly one Mission with owner, effort, dependencies, and evidence.

requirements.title: Evidence polymorphic link
requirements.text: Evidence is reusable and links polymorphically to any execution entity.

requirements.title: Outcome model
requirements.text: OutcomeRecord captures observed vs expected result, variance, evidence, and reviewer.

requirements.title: Relationship matrix
requirements.text: Parent-child and cross-link relationships must be defined in objective_relationship_matrix.json.

requirements.title: Lifecycle state machines
requirements.text: Objective, Mission, and Task lifecycle states and transitions must be enumerated.

requirements.title: Child cannot exceed parent
requirements.text: Children cannot exceed parent lifecycle state; e.g. Active Task under Draft Mission is illegal.

requirements.title: Ownership bindings
requirements.text: Every entity records executive owner, operational owner, responsible human, observers, and reviewers.

requirements.title: Version on mutation
requirements.text: Every change creates version number, timestamp, actor, reason, affected fields, and previous version.

requirements.title: Domain event catalog
requirements.text: Execution entities emit versioned domain events per objective_event_catalog.json.

requirements.title: Upward traceability chain
requirements.text: Platform must resolve Task through Mission, Workstream, Objective, Initiative, Institution.

requirements.title: Orphan work prohibited
requirements.text: No execution record may exist without valid parent chain to an Objective.

requirements.title: Permission inheritance
requirements.text: Visibility inherits downward; authority never inherits upward.

requirements.title: Analytics-ready fields
requirements.text: Canonical objects include immutable fields for analytics, reporting, and forecasting without shadow tables.

requirements.title: AI readiness fields
requirements.text: Entities expose human summary, machine summary, embedding text, keywords, and evidence references.

requirements.title: Database contract
requirements.text: objective_database_contract.json defines all execution tables with foreign keys and constraints.

requirements.title: Store key registry
requirements.text: EXECUTION_STORE_KEYS maps every canonical entity to a persistent store partition.

requirements.title: Required repositories declared
requirements.text: Nine canonical repositories must be declared for W3 implementation.
